name: 1-Wire Bus via DS2484
description: The `ds2484` platform provides access to 1-Wire busses via DS2484 device using the [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) for communication.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the device. Defaults to `0x18`.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [I2C](https://esphome.io/components/i2c/). Required if you have configured multiple I2C busses.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation. Required if you have multiple 1-Wire busses.
